raw_text: tomasz sadowy-sadowski aerospace engineering undergraduate @ tomasz.sadowy.sadowski@gmail.com & +48 796 105 502 summary 9 warsaw, poland in linkedin.com/in/tomasz-sadowy-sadowski/ tomasz is a university undergraduate with an aerospace engineering degree. he is a native polish speaker, fluent in english and spanish, intermediate in french. he developed strong communication skills among others through global cultural experiences - lived and worked abroad, has worked in international environments. he gained his first experience in working in aerospace industry. he possesses good knowledge of various cad programs such as siemens nx and catia. he is the acting chief engineer of advanced class aircraft in sae aerodesign warsaw. tomasz is also passionate about sports - completed 13 marathons and actively practices calisthenics as a hobby. experience sae aerodesign warsaw chief engineer of advanced class aircraft é3 may 2019 - present 9 warsaw, poland e designs the advanced class aircraft for international competition sae aerodesign e designs molds and stands for later manufacturing and assembly e coordinates and supervises manufacturing and assembly works member of students scientific society éb oct 2018 - may 2019 q warsaw, poland e manufactures and assembles aircraft components e prepared a technical report for pll lot on the influence of cosmic radiation on airliners e technical presentation of advanced class aircraft for sae aerodesign competition eads pzl warszawa-okecie s.a. intern in aerostructures engineering department é3 aug 2018 - sep 2018 q warsaw, poland e prepares assembly instructions of main wing components in catia e translates assembly instructions from english and spanish to polish achievements sae aerodesign west 2019 e ist place regular class overall results e 3rd place micro class overall results 3rd place advanced class overall results 1st place regular class mission performance 2nd place micro class mission performance 3rd place advanced class mission performance education warsaw university of technology aerospace engineering éb oct 2015 - sep 20199 warsaw, poland e final grade: very good e beng thesis: the influence of the turbulence intensity on the accuracy of business jet identification universidad politécnica de madrid grado en ingeneria aeroespacial 63 sep 2017 - jul 2018 9 madrid, spain e erasmus exchange program e all courses taught in spanish languages polish e native speaker english e certificate of proficiency in english (c2 level) e grade: a spanish e dele nivel c1 e 83.75/100 points french e self taught b1 level speaker german e finished a1 university course technical skills advanced skills: e cad/cam/cae programs: mainly siemens nx and catia e matlab and simulink e microsoft office (excel, word, powerpoint) e cifer - comprehensive identification from frequency responses basic skills: e ansys mechanical and ansys fluent e c++ programming hobbies and interests general skills data analysis group projects coordination communication skills working in international environment attention to details problem solving adaptability e sports: football (regular playing in six-a-side league teams), running (finished 13 marathons with a personal best of 3:07:10) and calisthenics. e reading e cinematography e travelling e airplanes and new technological solutions agree to the processing of personal data provided in this document for realising the recruitment process pursuant to the personal data protection act of 10 may 2018 (journal of laws 2018, item 1000) and in agreement with regulation (eu) 2016/679 of the european parlia- ment and of the council of 27 april 2016 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data and on the free movement of such data, and repealing directive 95/46/ec (general data protection regulation).
